reasoning: The control SI-4(2) focuses on system monitoring with automated tools for real-time analysis. In Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture necessary events for monitoring. Additionally, admission controllers can be used to enforce security policies and monitor compliance. Network policies can also be configured to monitor and restrict traffic, contributing to real-time analysis and security enforcement.
title: System Monitoring - System monitoring | automated tools and mechanisms for real - time analysis empl
